title: setState synchronously in useEffect — cascading renders

title: Footer newsletter form button not disabled during submit — double submission risk

title: Typewriter motion may cause CLS — no fixed height container

title: Roobert PRO font: confirm preload + display:swap on critical weights
evidence: 4 weights claimed (300/400/500/700); layout.tsx must preload at minimum 400+700
fix_hint: Add <link rel='preload' as='font'> for 400 + 700 weights or use next/font/local with display:'swap' + preload:true

title: Audit transition: all rules — replace with explicit properties + easing
fix_hint: Replace 'transition: all' with specific properties (opacity, transform, background-color) + cubic-bezier easing

title: Buttons + links: many lack :focus-visible ring styles
evidence: src/components/ui/button.tsx + custom buttons in CSS modules — focus-visible outline missing on multiple components
fix_hint: Add :focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #21cfff; outline-offset: 2px } site-wide via globals.css

title: Input + textarea + select: confirm visible :focus state matches Webflow
evidence: Forms must show clear focus ring per Webflow spec
fix_hint: Add :focus border-color #21cfff + box-shadow ring on input/textarea/select

title: Portfolio card images: verify sizes prop matches 305-sidebar + 2col grid (50% viewport)
evidence: Cards rendered in 2-col grid sized ~600px desktop; sizes attr likely 100vw

title: Gallery images below fold not lazy-loaded
evidence: 10+ Image instances; only above-fold should be priority/eager

title: Blog thumbnail Image likely missing sizes prop
evidence: blog-grid.tsx:198 Image without sizes for grid

title: Card click handler — keyboard a11y unverified (need tabIndex+role+Enter handler)
evidence: portfolio-card uses onClick — must support Enter/Space + role='button' or wrap in <button>
fix_hint: Wrap clickable card in <button> or add tabIndex=0 + onKeyDown for Enter/Space

title: PostHog client init must be wrapped in client component, not imported in server
evidence: posthog-js is browser-only; verify only imported under 'use client'
fix_hint: Confirm posthog.ts only imported by posthog-provider.tsx with 'use client'

title: Hydration mismatch: SSR matchMedia returns false, client may differ
evidence: useMediaQuery initial render = false on server, then true on client → flicker
fix_hint: Default to a deterministic value (e.g. mobile-first true) or render nothing until mounted
resolution_note: use-media-query uses useSyncExternalStore with deterministic getServerSnapshot

title: Oversized PNGs in public/images/webflow/ — convert to WebP/AVIF
evidence: Webflow exports raw PNG/JPG; some assets >1MB
fix_hint: Use next.config.ts images.formats and convert source assets to WebP
